invocation: PA/IP floor tightening pass (follow-up to /validate-model causal_war)

intervention.hypothesis: Batter cohort contaminated by marginal-volume players whose noisy WAR estimates inflate variance and depress combined Spearman lower CI below 0.60.
intervention.lever: Raise pa_min and ip_min qualification floors via --pa-min / --ip-min CLI flags in scripts/baseline_comparison.py.

gates.name: leakage_check
gates.measured: train 2015-2022 vs test 2023-2024 (disjoint by season range)

gates.name: spearman_rho_combined_lower_ci_mint
gates.note: User mint criterion: lower CI bound must clear spec gate. Floor lever did not lift it past 0.5862.

gates.name: spearman_rho_batters
gates.note: Lower CI 0.6107 now clears 0.60 -- batter cohort is mint after floor lift.

gates.name: spearman_rho_pitchers
gates.note: Lower CI 0.6246 clears 0.60 -- pitcher cohort remains mint.

verdict_explanation: Per-cohort Spearman lower CIs both clear 0.60 (batters 0.611, pitchers 0.625), but combined Spearman lower CI plateaus at 0.5862 across both 200/40 and 300/50 floors -- the floor lever moved the lower CI by ~0.009 from baseline (0.577 -> 0.5862) and then stalled. Combined-cohort fragility appears driven by cross-position scale tension (batters cluster higher in WAR, pitchers lower), not by marginal-volume batter noise. Spec gate (point estimate >= 0.60) PASSES; user mint criterion (lower CI >= 0.60) does NOT.
notes: PA/IP floor tightening was the assigned lever. It improved per-cohort metrics meaningfully but failed to push combined Spearman lower CI past the 0.60 mint bar -- it plateaued at 0.5862 between the 2x and 3x escalation. Per task constraints, did NOT escalate beyond pa_min=300/ip_min=50. Hypothesis updated: combined fragility is structural (cross-position WAR-scale mixing under rank correlation), not a marginal-volume batter problem. Recommended next levers (out of scope here): (a) richer DML confounders to tighten residual variance, (b) report per-cohort Spearman as the primary headline rather than combined, (c) per-position rank standardization before combining. Did not modify spec gates, model checkpoint, or src/analytics/causal_war.py per constraints.
